notes: Data sourced from FY2024 annual results (calendar year) or FY2025 (March fiscal year-end for STEP, HLNE, ICG). Market caps as of early March 2026. FX rates: GBP/USD 1.27, CHF/USD 1.12 (approx), CAD/USD 0.73, EUR/USD 1.07.

AUM_usd_bn.source: Man Group FY2024 press release, 27 Feb 2025

FEAUM_usd_bn.source: Man Group does not separately disclose fee-earning AUM

FRE_usd_mn.source: Man Group does not report FRE as a standalone metric; closest proxy is core net management fee profit

DE_usd_mn.source: Man Group does not report distributable earnings

EPS.source: Statutory diluted EPS 25.1 cents, Man Group FY2024

FRE_margin_pct.source: Not reported as FRE margin; core management fee EPS grew 17% YoY

FEAUM_yoy_pct.source: FEAUM not separately reported; total AUM grew ~0.7% YoY

mgmt_fee_rev_usd_mn.source: Core net management fees $1,097mn, Man Group FY2024

credit_pct.source: Credit AUM $35.0bn / total AUM $168.6bn = 20.8%, Man Group FY2024
